---
title: "Things I've made"
editor: visual
---

After a day of

## Baking

This past year I've been experimenting with yeast! I baked my first loaf of bread and tested out cinnamon rolls and cardamom buns.

:::::: {layout-style="auto" layout-ncol="3"}
::::: figure
![One of my recent loaves](media/bread.png){.regular-hover}

::: figure
![Cinnamon rolls with extra cinnamon](media/cinnamon.png){.regular-hover}
:::

::: figure
![Cardamom buns inspired by my summer in Barcelona](media/cardamom.png){.regular-hover}
:::
:::::
::::::

## Sewing

## Crochet
